tEn: Neural Message Passing for Quantum Chemistry
tZh: 神经消息传递用于量子化学
sEn: We reformulate existing models into a common framework called Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) and achieve state-of-the-art results on molecular property prediction.
sZh: 我们将现有模型重新表述为一个称为消息传递神经网络（MPNNs）的通用框架，并在分子性质预测上取得了最先进的结果。
absEn: Supervised learning on molecules has incredible potential to be useful in chemistry, drug discovery, and materials science. Luckily, several promising and closely related neural network models invariant to molecular symmetries have already been described in the literature. These models learn a message passing algorithm and aggregation procedure to compute a function of their entire input graph. At this point, the next step is to find a particularly effective variant of this general approach and apply it to chemical prediction benchmarks until we either solve them or reach the limits of the approach. In this paper, we reformulate existing models into a single common framework we call Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) and explore additional novel variations within this framework. Using MPNNs we demonstrate state of the art results on an important molecular property prediction benchmark; these results are strong enough that we believe future work should focus on datasets with larger molecules or more accurate ground truth labels.
absZh: 监督学习在分子上具有巨大的潜力，可用于化学、药物发现和材料科学。幸运的是，文献中已经描述了几种有前景且密切相关的神经网络模型，这些模型对分子对称性具有不变性。这些模型学习一种消息传递算法和聚合过程，以计算其整个输入图的函数。此时，下一步是找到这种通用方法的一个特别有效的变体，并将其应用于化学预测基准，直到我们解决它们或达到该方法的极限。在本文中，我们将现有模型重新表述为一个称为消息传递神经网络（MPNNs）的单一通用框架，并探索该框架内的其他新颖变体。使用MPNNs，我们在一个重要的分子性质预测基准上展示了最先进的结果；这些结果足够强大，以至于我们认为未来的工作应侧重于具有更大分子或更准确真实标签的数据集。

contrib.en: Developed an MPNN achieving state-of-the-art on all 13 QM9 targets and chemical accuracy on 11.
contrib.zh: 开发了一种MPNN，在全部13个QM9目标上达到最先进水平，并在11个目标上达到化学精度。

contrib.en: Introduced multiple MPNNs predicting DFT to chemical accuracy on 5 targets using only molecular topology.
contrib.zh: 引入多种MPNN，仅使用分子拓扑就在5个目标上以化学精度预测DFT。

contrib.en: Proposed a general method to train MPNNs with larger node representations without increasing computation or memory.
contrib.zh: 提出一种通用方法，在不增加计算或内存的情况下训练具有更大节点表示的MPNN。

contrib.en: Unified existing graph neural network models into a common Message Passing Neural Network (MPNN) framework.
contrib.zh: 将现有图神经网络模型统一为通用的消息传递神经网络（MPNN）框架。

contrib.en: Demonstrated the importance of long-range interactions via master node and set2set output for molecular property prediction.
contrib.zh: 通过主节点和set2set输出证明了长程相互作用对分子性质预测的重要性。

contrib.en: Introduced a multi-tower architecture that improves scalability and generalization performance.
contrib.zh: 引入多塔架构，提高了可扩展性和泛化性能。

limits.en: Models were evaluated only on small organic molecules (up to 9 heavy atoms) from QM9 dataset.
limits.zh: 模型仅在QM9数据集中的小有机分子（最多9个重原子）上评估。

limits.en: Generalization to larger molecules or different chemical spaces remains unverified.
limits.zh: 对更大分子或不同化学空间的泛化能力尚未验证。

limits.en: Spatial information reliance may limit applicability when 3D conformations are unavailable.
limits.zh: 对空间信息的依赖可能限制其在缺乏3D构象时的适用性。

limits.en: Training one model per target outperforms joint training, limiting multi-task efficiency.
limits.zh: 每个目标单独训练优于联合训练，限制了多任务效率。

limits.en: The towers variant could not be effectively combined with the edge network message function.
limits.zh: 多塔变体无法与边缘网络消息函数有效结合。

items.en: Supervised learning on molecules has incredible potential to be useful in chemistry, drug discovery, and materials science. Luckily, several promising and closely related neural network models invariant to molecular symmetries have already been described in the literature. These models learn a message passing algorithm and aggregation procedure to compute a function of their entire input graph. At this point, the next step is to find a particularly effective variant of this general approach and apply it to chemical prediction benchmarks until we either solve them or reach the limits of the approach. In this paper, we reformulate existing models into a single common framework we call Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) and explore additional novel variations within this framework. Using MPNNs we demonstrate state of the art results on an important molecular property prediction benchmark; these results are strong enough that we believe future work should focus on datasets with larger molecules or more accurate ground truth labels.
items.zh: 对分子进行监督学习在化学、药物发现和材料科学中具有巨大的应用潜力。幸运的是，文献中已经描述了几种有前景且密切相关的、对分子对称性不变的神经网络模型。这些模型学习消息传递算法和聚合过程，以计算其整个输入图的函数。目前，下一步是找到这种通用方法的一个特别有效的变体，并将其应用于化学预测基准，直到我们解决这些问题或达到该方法的极限。在本文中，我们将现有模型重新表述为一个统一的通用框架，称为消息传递神经网络（MPNN），并探索该框架内的其他新颖变体。使用MPNN，我们在一个重要的分子性质预测基准上展示了最先进的结果；这些结果足够强大，以至于我们认为未来的工作应专注于包含更大分子或更准确真实标签的数据集。

items.en: The past decade has seen remarkable success in the use of deep neural networks to understand and translate natural language (Wu et al., 2016), generate and decode complex audio signals (Hinton et al., 2012), and infer features from real-world images and videos (Krizhevsky et al., 2012). Although chemists have applied machine learning to many problems over the years, predicting the properties of molecules and materials using machine learning (and especially deep learning) is still in its infancy. To date, most research applying machine learning to chemistry tasks (Hansen et al., 2015; Huang & von Lilienfeld, 2016; Rupp et al., 2012; Rogers & Hahn, 2010; Montavon et al., 2012; Behler & Parrinello, 2007; Schoenholz et al., 2016) has revolved around feature engineering. While neural networks have been applied in a variety of situations (Merkwirth & Lengauer, 2005; Micheli, 2009; Lusci et al., 2013; Duvenaud et al., 2015), they have yet to become widely adopted. This situation is reminiscent of the state of image models before the broad adoption of convolutional neural networks and is due, in part, to a dearth of empirical evidence that neural architectures with the appropriate inductive bias can be successful in this domain.
items.zh: 过去十年，深度神经网络在理解和翻译自然语言（Wu等人，2016）、生成和解码复杂音频信号（Hinton等人，2012）以及从真实世界图像和视频中推断特征（Krizhevsky等人，2012）方面取得了显著成功。尽管化学家多年来已将机器学习应用于许多问题，但使用机器学习（尤其是深度学习）预测分子和材料的性质仍处于起步阶段。迄今为止，大多数将机器学习应用于化学任务的研究（Hansen等人，2015；Huang & von Lilienfeld，2016；Rupp等人，2012；Rogers & Hahn，2010；Montavon等人，2012；Behler & Parrinello，2007；Schoenholz等人，2016）都围绕特征工程展开。虽然神经网络已在多种情况下得到应用（Merkwirth & Lengauer，2005；Micheli，2009；Lusci等人，2013；Duvenaud等人，2015），但尚未被广泛采用。这种情况让人联想到卷积神经网络被广泛采用之前的图像模型状态，部分原因是缺乏经验证据表明具有适当归纳偏置的神经架构能够在该领域取得成功。

items.capEn: Figure 1: A Message Passing Neural Network predicts quantum properties of an organic molecule by modeling a computationally expensive DFT calculation.
items.capZh: 图1：消息传递神经网络通过模拟计算昂贵的DFT计算来预测有机分子的量子性质。

items.en: Recently, large scale quantum chemistry calculation and molecular dynamics simulations coupled with advances in high throughput experiments have begun to generate data at an unprecedented rate. Most classical techniques do not make effective use of the larger amounts of data that are now available. The time is ripe to apply more powerful and flexible machine learning methods to these problems, assuming we can find models with suitable inductive biases. The symmetries of atomic systems suggest neural networks that operate on graph structured data and are invariant to graph isomorphism might also be appropriate for molecules. Sufficiently successful models could someday help automate challenging chemical search problems in drug discovery or materials science.
items.zh: 最近，大规模量子化学计算和分子动力学模拟，加上高通量实验的进展，开始以前所未有的速度生成数据。大多数经典技术并未有效利用现在可用的更大数据量。假设我们能找到具有适当归纳偏置的模型，那么应用更强大、更灵活的机器学习方法来解决这些问题的时机已经成熟。原子系统的对称性表明，作用于图结构数据并对图同构不变的神经网络可能也适用于分子。足够成功的模型有朝一日可能有助于自动化药物发现或材料科学中具有挑战性的化学搜索问题。

items.en: In this paper, our goal is to demonstrate effective machine learning models for chemical prediction problems that are capable of learning their own features from molecular graphs directly and are invariant to graph isomorphism. To that end, we describe a general framework for supervised learning on graphs called Message Passing Neural Networks (MPNNs) that simply abstracts the commonalities between several of the most promising existing neural models for graph structured data, in order to make it easier to understand the relationships between them and come up with novel variations. Given how many researchers have published models that fit into the MPNN framework, we believe that the community should push this general approach as far as possible on practically important graph problems and only suggest new variations that are well motivated by applications, such as the application we consider here: predicting the quantum mechanical properties of small organic molecules (see task schematic in figure 1).
items.zh: 在本文中，我们的目标是展示用于化学预测问题的有效机器学习模型，这些模型能够直接从分子图中学习自己的特征，并且对图同构不变。为此，我们描述了一个用于图监督学习的通用框架，称为消息传递神经网络（MPNN），它简单地抽象了现有几种最有前景的图结构数据神经模型之间的共同点，以便更容易理解它们之间的关系并提出新颖的变体。鉴于许多研究人员已经发表了符合MPNN框架的模型，我们相信社区应该在实际重要的图问题上尽可能推动这种通用方法，并且只提出由应用（例如我们在此考虑的应用：预测小有机分子的量子力学性质，见图1中的任务示意图）充分激发的新变体。

items.en: In general, the search for practically effective machine learning (ML) models in a given domain proceeds through a sequence of increasingly realistic and interesting benchmarks. Here we focus on the QM9 dataset as such a benchmark (Ramakrishnan et al., 2014). QM9 consists of 130k molecules with 13 properties for each molecule which are approximated by an expensive111By comparison, the inference time of the neural networks discussed in this work is 300k times faster. quantum mechanical simulation method (DFT), to yield 13 corresponding regression tasks. These tasks are plausibly representative of many important chemical prediction problems and are (currently) difficult for many existing methods. Additionally, QM9 also includes complete spatial information for the single low energy conformation of the atoms in the molecule that was used in calculating the chemical properties. QM9 therefore lets us consider both the setting where the complete molecular geometry is known (atomic distances, bond angles, etc.) and the setting where we need to compute properties that might still be defined in terms of the spatial positions of atoms, but where only the atom and bond information (i.e. graph) is available as input. In the latter case, the model must implicitly fit something about the computation used to determine a low energy 3D conformation and hopefully would still work on problems where it is not clear how to compute a reasonable 3D conformation.
items.zh: 通常，在特定领域中寻找实际有效的机器学习（ML）模型的过程会经历一系列越来越真实和有趣的基准测试。这里我们关注QM9数据集作为这样一个基准（Ramakrishnan等人，2014）。QM9包含13万个分子，每个分子有13个性质，这些性质通过昂贵的量子力学模拟方法（DFT）近似得到，从而产生13个相应的回归任务。这些任务合理地代表了许多重要的化学预测问题，并且（目前）对许多现有方法来说具有挑战性。此外，QM9还包括用于计算化学性质的分子中原子单一低能构象的完整空间信息。因此，QM9让我们能够考虑两种设置：一种是已知完整分子几何结构（原子距离、键角等）的情况，另一种是我们需要计算可能仍由原子空间位置定义的性质，但只有原子和键信息（即图）作为输入的情况。在后一种情况下，模型必须隐式地拟合用于确定低能3D构象的计算的某些方面，并且希望它仍然适用于不清楚如何计算合理3D构象的问题。

items.en: When measuring the performance of our models on QM9, there are two important benchmark error levels. The first is the estimated average error of the DFT approximation to nature, which we refer to as “DFT error.” The second, known as “chemical accuracy,” is a target error that has been established by the chemistry community. Estimates of DFT error and chemical accuracy are provided for each of the 13 targets in Faber et al. (2017). One important goal of this line of research is to produce a model which can achieve chemical accuracy with respect to the true targets as measured by an extremely precise experiment. The dataset containing the true targets on all 134k molecules does not currently exist. However, the ability to fit the DFT approximation to within chemical accuracy would be an encouraging step in this direction. For all 13 targets, achieving chemical accuracy is at least as hard as achieving DFT error. In the rest of this paper when we talk about chemical accuracy we generally mean with respect to our available ground truth labels.
items.zh: 在衡量我们的模型在QM9上的性能时，有两个重要的基准误差水平。第一个是DFT近似于自然界的估计平均误差，我们称之为“DFT误差”。第二个称为“化学精度”，是化学界建立的目标误差。Faber等人（2017）为13个目标中的每一个提供了DFT误差和化学精度的估计。这一研究方向的一个重要目标是产生一个模型，该模型能够达到相对于真实目标（通过极其精确的实验测量）的化学精度。包含所有13.4万个分子真实目标的数据集目前并不存在。然而，能够将DFT近似拟合到化学精度以内将是朝着这个方向迈出的令人鼓舞的一步。对于所有13个目标，达到化学精度至少与达到DFT误差一样困难。在本文的其余部分，当我们谈论化学精度时，通常是指相对于我们可用的真实标签。

items.en: In this paper, by exploring novel variations of models in the MPNN family, we are able to both achieve a new state of the art on the QM9 dataset and to predict the DFT calculation to within chemical accuracy on all but two targets. In particular, we provide the following key contributions:
items.zh: 在本文中，通过探索MPNN家族中模型的新颖变体，我们既能够在QM9数据集上取得新的最先进结果，又能够预测DFT计算达到除两个目标外的所有目标的化学精度以内。具体来说，我们提供以下关键贡献：

items.en: We develop an MPNN which achieves state of the art results on all 13 targets and predicts DFT to within chemical accuracy on 11 out of 13 targets.
items.zh: 我们开发了一个MPNN，在所有13个目标上取得了最先进的结果，并在11个目标上将DFT预测到化学精度以内。

items.en: We develop several different MPNNs which predict DFT to within chemical accuracy on 5 out of 13 targets while operating on the topology of the molecule alone (with no spatial information as input).
items.zh: 我们开发了几种不同的MPNN，在仅基于分子拓扑结构（无空间信息作为输入）的情况下，在5个目标上将DFT预测到化学精度以内。

items.en: We develop a general method to train MPNNs with larger node representations without a corresponding increase in computation time or memory, yielding a substantial savings over previous MPNNs for high dimensional node representations.
items.zh: 我们开发了一种通用方法，可以在不相应增加计算时间或内存的情况下训练具有更大节点表示的MPNN，从而在高层节点表示上相比以前的MPNN节省了大量资源。

items.en: We believe our work is an important step towards making well-designed MPNN’s the default for supervised learning on modestly sized molecules. In order for this to happen, researchers need to perform careful empirical studies to find the proper way to use these types of models and to make any necessary improvements to them, it is not sufficient for these models to have been described in the literature if there is only limited accompanying empirical work in the chemical domain. Indeed convolutional neural networks existed for decades before careful empirical work applying them to image classification (Krizhevsky et al., 2012) helped them displace SVMs on top of hand-engineered features for a host of computer vision problems.
items.zh: 我们相信，我们的工作是朝着使精心设计的MPNN成为中等大小分子监督学习默认方法的重要一步。为了实现这一点，研究人员需要进行仔细的实证研究，以找到使用这些类型模型的正确方法，并对其进行任何必要的改进；如果只有有限的化学领域实证工作伴随，那么这些模型在文献中被描述是不够的。事实上，卷积神经网络在仔细的实证工作将其应用于图像分类（Krizhevsky等人，2012）并帮助其在许多计算机视觉问题上取代基于手工特征的支持向量机之前，已经存在了几十年。

items.en: The message functions Mtsubscript𝑀𝑡M_{t}, vertex update functions Utsubscript𝑈𝑡U_{t}, and readout function R𝑅R are all learned differentiable functions. R𝑅R operates on the set of node states and must be invariant to permutations of the node states in order for the MPNN to be invariant to graph isomorphism. In what follows, we define previous models in the literature by specifying the message function Mtsubscript𝑀𝑡M_{t}, vertex update function Utsubscript𝑈𝑡U_{t}, and readout function R𝑅R used. Note one could also learn edge features in an MPNN by introducing hidden states for all edges in the graph hev​wtsuperscriptsubscriptℎsubscript𝑒𝑣𝑤𝑡h_{e_{vw}}^{t} and updating them analogously to equations 1 and 2. Of the existing MPNNs, only Kearnes et al. (2016) has used this idea.

This message passing scheme may be problematic since the resulting message vector is mvt+1=(∑hwt,∑ev​w),superscriptsubscript𝑚𝑣𝑡1superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑤𝑡subscript𝑒𝑣𝑤m_{v}^{t+1}=\left(\sum h_{w}^{t},\sum e_{vw}\right), which separately sums over connected nodes and connected edges. It follows that the message passing implemented in Duvenaud et al. (2015) is unable to identify correlations between edge states and node states.
items.zh: 使用的消息函数为M(h_v, h_w, e_{vw}) = (h_w, e_{vw})，其中(.,.)表示拼接。使用的顶点更新函数为U_t(h_v^t, m_v^{t+1}) = σ(H_t^{deg(v)} m_v^{t+1})，其中σ是sigmoid函数，deg(v)是顶点v的度数，H_t^N是每个时间步t和顶点度数N的学习矩阵。R具有到所有先前隐藏状态h_v^t的跳跃连接，并且等于f(∑_{v,t} softmax(W_t h_v^t))，其中f是一个神经网络，W_t是学习的读出矩阵，每个时间步t一个。这种消息传递方案可能有问题，因为得到的消息向量是m_v^{t+1} = (∑ h_w^t, ∑ e_{vw})，它分别对连接的节点和连接的边求和。因此，Duvenaud等人（2015）中实现的消息传递无法识别边状态和节点状态之间的相关性。

items.zh: 这项工作考虑了图中每个节点都有目标以及存在图级别目标的情况。它还考虑了在每个时间步存在节点级别影响的情况，在这种情况下，更新函数将 (hv,xv,mv) 的拼接作为输入，其中 xv 是表示对顶点 v 的外部影响的外部向量。消息函数 M(hv,hw,evw) 是一个神经网络，它接收 (hv,hw,evw) 的拼接。顶点更新函数 U(hv,xv,mv) 是一个神经网络，它接收 (hv,xv,mv) 的拼接作为输入。最后，在存在图级别输出的情况下，R = f(∑_{v∈G} hv^T)，其中 f 是一个神经网络，它接收最终隐藏状态 hv^T 的和。注意，原始工作仅针对 T=1 定义了模型。

items.en: Laplacian Based Methods, Bruna et al. (2013); Defferrard et al. (2016); Kipf & Welling (2016)
items.zh: 基于拉普拉斯的方法，Bruna 等人 (2013); Defferrard 等人 (2016); Kipf & Welling (2016)

items.en: These methods generalize the notion of the convolution operation typically applied to image datasets to an operation that operates on an arbitrary graph G𝐺G with a real valued adjacency matrix A𝐴A. The operations defined in Bruna et al. (2013); Defferrard et al. (2016) result in message functions of the form Mt​(hvt,hwt)=Cv​wt​hwtsubscript𝑀𝑡superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑡superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑤𝑡subscriptsuperscript𝐶𝑡𝑣𝑤superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑤𝑡M_{t}(h_{v}^{t},h_{w}^{t})=C^{t}_{vw}h_{w}^{t}, where the matrices Cv​wtsubscriptsuperscript𝐶𝑡𝑣𝑤C^{t}_{vw} are parameterized by the eigenvectors of the graph laplacian L𝐿L, and the learned parameters of the model. The vertex update function used is Ut​(hvt,mvt+1)=σ​(mvt+1)subscript𝑈𝑡superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑡superscriptsubscript𝑚𝑣𝑡1𝜎superscriptsubscript𝑚𝑣𝑡1U_{t}(h_{v}^{t},m_{v}^{t+1})=\sigma(m_{v}^{t+1}) where σ𝜎\sigma is some pointwise non-linearity (such as ReLU).
items.zh: 这些方法将通常应用于图像数据集的卷积操作的概念推广到在具有实值邻接矩阵 A 的任意图 G 上操作的操作。Bruna 等人 (2013); Defferrard 等人 (2016) 中定义的操作产生形式为 Mt(hv^t, hw^t) = Cvw^t hw^t 的消息函数，其中矩阵 Cvw^t 由图拉普拉斯矩阵 L 的特征向量和模型的学习参数参数化。使用的顶点更新函数是 Ut(hv^t, mv^{t+1}) = σ(mv^{t+1})，其中 σ 是某种逐点非线性函数（如 ReLU）。

The vertex update function is Uvt​(hvt,mvt+1)=ReLU​(Wt​mvt+1)superscriptsubscript𝑈𝑣𝑡superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑡superscriptsubscript𝑚𝑣𝑡1ReLUsuperscript𝑊𝑡superscriptsubscript𝑚𝑣𝑡1U_{v}^{t}(h_{v}^{t},m_{v}^{t+1})=\textrm{ReLU}(W^{t}m_{v}^{t+1}). For the exact expressions for the Cv​wtsubscriptsuperscript𝐶𝑡𝑣𝑤C^{t}_{vw} and the derivation of the reformulation of these models as MPNNs, see the supplementary material.
items.zh: Kipf & Welling (2016) 模型产生消息函数 Mt(hv^t, hw^t) = cvw hw^t，其中 cvw = (deg(v) deg(w))^{-1/2} Avw。顶点更新函数是 Uv^t(hv^t, mv^{t+1}) = ReLU(W^t mv^{t+1})。关于 Cvw^t 的精确表达式以及将这些模型重新表述为 MPNN 的推导，请参见补充材料。

items.en: Given how many instances of MPNN’s have appeared in the literature, we should focus on pushing this general family as far as possible in a specific application of substantial practical importance. This way we can determine the most crucial implementation details and potentially reach the limits of these models to guide us towards future modeling improvements.
items.zh: 鉴于文献中出现了如此多的 MPNN 实例，我们应该专注于在具有重要实际意义的具体应用中尽可能推动这个通用家族的发展。这样我们可以确定最关键的实现细节，并可能达到这些模型的极限，以指导我们未来的建模改进。

items.en: One downside of all of these approaches is computation time. Recent work has adapted the GG-NN architecture to larger graphs by passing messages on only subsets of the graph at each time step (Marino et al., 2016). In this work we also present a MPNN modification that can improve the computational costs.
items.zh: 所有这些方法的一个缺点是计算时间。最近的工作通过在每个时间步仅在图子集上传递消息，将 GG-NN 架构适应于更大的图（Marino 等人，2016）。在这项工作中，我们还提出了一种可以改善计算成本的 MPNN 修改。

items.en: Although in principle quantum mechanics lets us compute the properties of molecules, the laws of physics lead to equations that are far too difficult to solve exactly. Therefore scientists have developed a hierarchy of approximations to quantum mechanics with varying tradeoffs of speed and accuracy, such as Density Functional Theory (DFT) with a variety of functionals (Becke, 1993; Hohenberg & Kohn, 1964), the GW approximation (Hedin, 1965), and Quantum Monte-Carlo (Ceperley & Alder, 1986). Despite being widely used, DFT is simultaneously still too slow to be applied to large systems (scaling as 𝒪​(Ne3)𝒪superscriptsubscript𝑁𝑒3\mathcal{O}(N_{e}^{3}) where Nesubscript𝑁𝑒N_{e} is the number of electrons) and exhibits systematic as well as random errors relative to exact solutions to Schrödinger’s equation. For example, to run the DFT calculation on a single 9 heavy atom molecule in QM9 takes around an hour on a single core of a Xeon E5-2660 (2.2 GHz) using a version of Gaussian G09 (ES64L-G09RevD.01) (Bing et al., 2017). For a 17 heavy atom molecule, computation time is up to 8 hours. Empirical potentials have been developed, such as the Stillinger-Weber potential (Stillinger & Weber, 1985), that are fast and accurate but must be created from scratch, from first principles, for every new composition of atoms.
items.zh: 尽管原则上量子力学让我们可以计算分子的性质，但物理定律导致的方程过于复杂，无法精确求解。因此，科学家们开发了一系列量子力学的近似方法，在速度和精度之间有不同的权衡，例如具有各种泛函的密度泛函理论（DFT）（Becke, 1993; Hohenberg & Kohn, 1964）、GW 近似（Hedin, 1965）和量子蒙特卡洛（Ceperley & Alder, 1986）。尽管被广泛使用，DFT 仍然太慢，无法应用于大型系统（缩放为 O(Ne^3)，其中 Ne 是电子数），并且相对于薛定谔方程的精确解存在系统性和随机性误差。例如，在 QM9 中对单个 9 重原子分子进行 DFT 计算，在使用 Gaussian G09 (ES64L-G09RevD.01) 版本的 Xeon E5-2660 (2.2 GHz) 单核上大约需要一小时（Bing 等人，2017）。对于 17 重原子分子，计算时间长达 8 小时。已经开发了经验势，例如 Stillinger-Weber 势（Stillinger & Weber, 1985），它们快速且准确，但必须从头开始，从第一原理出发，为每种新的原子组成创建。

items.en: Hu et al. (2003) used neural networks to approximate a particularly troublesome term in DFT called the exchange correlation potential to improve the accuracy of DFT. However, their method fails to improve upon the efficiency of DFT and relies on a large set of ad hoc atomic descriptors.
items.zh: Hu 等人 (2003) 使用神经网络来近似 DFT 中一个特别麻烦的项，称为交换相关势，以提高 DFT 的精度。然而，他们的方法未能提高 DFT 的效率，并且依赖于大量特设的原子描述符。

items.en: Two more recent approaches by Behler & Parrinello (2007) and Rupp et al. (2012) attempt to approximate solutions to quantum mechanics directly without appealing to DFT. In the first case single-hidden-layer neural networks were used to approximate the energy and forces for configurations of a Silicon melt with the goal of speeding up molecular dynamics simulations. The second paper used Kernel Ridge Regression (KRR) to infer atomization energies over a wide range of molecules. In both cases hand engineered features were used (symmetry functions and the Coulomb matrix, respectively) that built physical symmetries into the input representation. Subsequent papers have replaced KRR by a neural network.
items.zh: Behler & Parrinello (2007) 和 Rupp 等人 (2012) 的两种更近期的方法试图直接近似量子力学的解，而不诉诸 DFT。第一种方法使用单隐藏层神经网络来近似硅熔体构型的能量和力，旨在加速分子动力学模拟。第二篇论文使用核岭回归（KRR）来推断广泛分子的原子化能量。在这两种情况下，都使用了手工设计的特征（分别是对称函数和库仑矩阵），这些特征将物理对称性构建到输入表示中。后续论文用神经网络取代了 KRR。

items.en: Both of these lines of research used hand engineered features that have intrinsic limitations. The work of Behler & Parrinello (2007) used a representation that was manifestly invariant to graph isomorphism, but has difficulty when applied to systems with more than three species of atoms and fails to generalize to novel compositions. The representation used in Rupp et al. (2012) is not invariant to graph isomorphism. Instead, this invariance must be learned by the downstream model through dataset augmentation.
items.zh: 这两条研究路线都使用了具有内在局限性的手工设计特征。Behler & Parrinello (2007) 的工作使用了明显对图同构不变的表示，但在应用于具有超过三种原子种类的系统时遇到困难，并且无法泛化到新的组成。Rupp 等人 (2012) 中使用的表示对图同构不是不变的。相反，这种不变性必须通过数据集增强由下游模型学习。

items.en: In addition to the eight MPNN’s discussed in Section 2 there have been a number of other approaches to machine learning on graphical data which take advantage of the symmetries in a number of ways. One such family of approaches define a preprocessing step which constructs a canonical graph representation which can then be fed into into a standard classifier. Examples in this family include Niepert et al. (2016) and Rupp et al. (2012). Finally Scarselli et al. (2009) define a message passing process on graphs which is run until convergence, instead of for a finite number of time steps as in MPNNs.
items.zh: 除了第 2 节中讨论的八个 MPNN 之外，还有许多其他图数据机器学习方法以多种方式利用对称性。其中一类方法定义了一个预处理步骤，构建一个规范图表示，然后可以将其输入到标准分类器中。这类方法的例子包括 Niepert 等人 (2016) 和 Rupp 等人 (2012)。最后，Scarselli 等人 (2009) 定义了一个图上的消息传递过程，该过程运行直到收敛，而不是像 MPNN 中那样运行有限的时间步。

items.en: To investigate the success of MPNNs on predicting chemical properties, we use the publicly available QM9 dataset (Ramakrishnan et al., 2014). Molecules in the dataset consist of Hydrogen (H), Carbon (C), Oxygen (O), Nitrogen (N), and Flourine (F) atoms and contain up to 9 heavy (non Hydrogen) atoms. In all, this results in about 134k drug-like organic molecules that span a wide range of chemistry. For each molecule DFT is used to find a reasonable low energy structure and hence atom “positions” are available. Additionally a wide range of interesting and fundamental chemical properties are computed. Given how fundamental some of the QM9 properties are, it is hard to believe success on more challenging chemical tasks will be possible if we can’t make accurate statistical predictions for the properties computed in QM9.
items.zh: 为了研究 MPNN 在预测化学性质方面的成功，我们使用了公开可用的 QM9 数据集（Ramakrishnan 等人，2014）。数据集中的分子由氢（H）、碳（C）、氧（O）、氮（N）和氟（F）原子组成，最多包含 9 个重（非氢）原子。总共，这产生了大约 134k 种类药有机分子，涵盖了广泛的化学领域。对于每个分子，使用 DFT 找到合理的低能结构，因此可以获得原子“位置”。此外，还计算了各种有趣且基本的化学性质。鉴于 QM9 的一些性质如此基础，如果我们不能对 QM9 中计算的属性做出准确的统计预测，就很难相信在更具挑战性的化学任务上能够成功。

items.en: We can group the different properties we try to predict into four broad categories. First, we have four properties related to how tightly bound together the atoms in a molecule are. These measure the energy required to break up the molecule at different temperatures and pressures. These include the atomization energy at 0​K0𝐾0K, U0subscript𝑈0U_{0} (eV), atomization energy at room temperature, U𝑈U (eV), enthalpy of atomization at room temperature, H𝐻H (eV), and free energy of atomization, G𝐺G (eV).
items.zh: 我们可以将我们试图预测的不同属性分为四大类。首先，我们有四个与分子中原子结合紧密程度相关的属性。这些属性测量在不同温度和压力下分解分子所需的能量。它们包括 0K 下的原子化能 U0 (eV)、室温下的原子化能 U (eV)、室温下的原子化焓 H (eV) 和原子化自由能 G (eV)。

items.en: Next there are properties related to fundamental vibrations of the molecule, including the highest fundamental vibrational frequency ω1subscript𝜔1\omega_{1} (c​m−1𝑐superscript𝑚1cm^{-1}) and the zero point vibrational energy (ZPVE) (eV).
items.zh: 接下来是与分子基本振动相关的属性，包括最高基本振动频率 ω1 (cm^{-1}) 和零点振动能 (ZPVE) (eV)。

items.en: Additionally, there are a number of properties that concern the states of the electrons in the molecule. They include the energy of the electron in the highest occupied molecular orbital (HOMO) εHOMOsubscript𝜀HOMO\varepsilon_{\text{HOMO}} (eV), the energy of the lowest unoccupied molecular orbital (LUMO) εLUMOsubscript𝜀LUMO\varepsilon_{\text{LUMO}} (eV), and the electron energy gap (Δ​εΔ𝜀\Delta\varepsilon (eV)). The electron energy gap is simply the difference εHOMO−εLUMOsubscript𝜀HOMOsubscript𝜀LUMO\varepsilon_{\text{HOMO}}-\varepsilon_{\text{LUMO}}.
items.zh: 此外，还有许多与分子中电子状态相关的性质。它们包括最高占据分子轨道（HOMO）中的电子能量 εHOMO（eV）、最低未占据分子轨道（LUMO）中的电子能量 εLUMO（eV）以及电子能隙 Δε（eV）。电子能隙就是 εHOMO - εLUMO 的差值。

items.en: Finally, there are several measures of the spatial distribution of electrons in the molecule. These include the electronic spatial extent ⟨R2⟩delimited-⟨⟩superscript𝑅2\langle R^{2}\rangle (Bohr2), the norm of the dipole moment μ𝜇\mu (Debye), and the norm of static polarizability α𝛼\alpha (Bohr3). For a more detailed description of these properties, see the supplementary material.
items.zh: 最后，还有几种衡量分子中电子空间分布的指标。这些包括电子空间范围 ⟨R²⟩（Bohr²）、偶极矩 μ 的范数（Debye）以及静态极化率 α 的范数（Bohr³）。关于这些性质的更详细描述，请参见补充材料。

items.en: We began our exploration of MPNNs around the GG-NN model which we believe to be a strong baseline. We focused on trying different message functions, output functions, finding the appropriate input representation, and properly tuning hyperparameters.
items.zh: 我们围绕 GG-NN 模型开始了对 MPNN 的探索，我们认为该模型是一个强大的基线。我们专注于尝试不同的消息函数、输出函数、找到合适的输入表示以及正确调整超参数。

items.en: For the rest of the paper we use d𝑑d to denote the dimension of the internal hidden representation of each node in the graph, and n𝑛n to denote the number of nodes in the graph. Our implementation of MPNNs in general operates on directed graphs with a separate message channel for incoming and outgoing edges, in which case the incoming message mvsubscript𝑚𝑣m_{v} is the concatenation of mvinsuperscriptsubscript𝑚𝑣inm_{v}^{\textrm{in}} and mvoutsuperscriptsubscript𝑚𝑣outm_{v}^{\textrm{out}}, this was also used in Li et al. (2016). When we apply this to undirected chemical graphs we treat the graph as directed, where each original edge becomes both an incoming and outgoing edge with the same label. Note there is nothing special about the direction of the edge, it is only relevant for parameter tying. Treating undirected graphs as directed means that the size of the message channel is 2​d2𝑑2d instead of d𝑑d.
items.zh: 在本文的其余部分，我们用 d 表示图中每个节点内部隐藏表示的维度，用 n 表示图中的节点数。我们的 MPNN 实现通常操作在有向图上，并为传入和传出边使用单独的消息通道，在这种情况下，传入消息 m_v 是 m_v^in 和 m_v^out 的拼接，这也被 Li 等人（2016）使用。当我们将此应用于无向化学图时，我们将图视为有向图，其中每条原始边都成为具有相同标签的传入和传出边。注意边的方向没有特殊之处，它仅与参数绑定相关。将无向图视为有向图意味着消息通道的大小是 2d 而不是 d。

items.en: The input to our MPNN model is a set of feature vectors for the nodes of the graph, xvsubscript𝑥𝑣x_{v}, and an adjacency matrix A𝐴A with vector valued entries to indicate different bonds in the molecule as well as pairwise spatial distance between two atoms. We experimented as well with the message function used in the GG-NN family, which assumes discrete edge labels, in which case the matrix A𝐴A has entries in a discrete alphabet of size k𝑘k. The initial hidden states hv0superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣0h_{v}^{0} are set to be the atom input feature vectors xvsubscript𝑥𝑣x_{v} and are padded up to some larger dimension d𝑑d. All of our experiments used weight tying at each time step t𝑡t, and a GRU (Cho et al., 2014) for the update function as in the GG-NN family.
items.zh: 我们的 MPNN 模型的输入是图节点的特征向量集合 x_v，以及一个邻接矩阵 A，其条目为向量值，用于指示分子中不同的键以及两个原子之间的成对空间距离。我们还尝试了 GG-NN 系列中使用的消息函数，该函数假设离散的边标签，在这种情况下，矩阵 A 的条目属于大小为 k 的离散字母表。初始隐藏状态 h_v^0 被设置为原子输入特征向量 x_v，并填充到某个更大的维度 d。我们所有的实验都在每个时间步 t 使用了权重绑定，并使用 GRU（Cho 等人，2014）作为更新函数，与 GG-NN 系列相同。

items.en: Matrix Multiplication: We started with the message function used in GG-NN which is defined by the equation M​(hv,hw,ev​w)=Aev​w​hw𝑀subscriptℎ𝑣subscriptℎ𝑤subscript𝑒𝑣𝑤subscript𝐴subscript𝑒𝑣𝑤subscriptℎ𝑤M(h_{v},h_{w},e_{vw})=A_{e_{vw}}h_{w}.
items.zh: 矩阵乘法：我们从 GG-NN 中使用的消息函数开始，该函数由方程 M(h_v, h_w, e_vw) = A_{e_vw} h_w 定义。

items.en: Edge Network: To allow vector valued edge features we propose the message function M​(hv,hw,ev​w)=A​(ev​w)​hw𝑀subscriptℎ𝑣subscriptℎ𝑤subscript𝑒𝑣𝑤𝐴subscript𝑒𝑣𝑤subscriptℎ𝑤M(h_{v},h_{w},e_{vw})=A(e_{vw})h_{w} where A​(ev​w)𝐴subscript𝑒𝑣𝑤A(e_{vw}) is a neural network which maps the edge vector ev​wsubscript𝑒𝑣𝑤e_{vw} to a d×d𝑑𝑑d\times d matrix.
items.zh: 边网络：为了允许向量值的边特征，我们提出了消息函数 M(h_v, h_w, e_vw) = A(e_vw) h_w，其中 A(e_vw) 是一个神经网络，它将边向量 e_vw 映射到一个 d×d 矩阵。

items.en: Pair Message: One property that the matrix multiplication rule has is that the message from node w𝑤w to node v𝑣v is a function only of the hidden state hwsubscriptℎ𝑤h_{w} and the edge ev​wsubscript𝑒𝑣𝑤e_{vw}. In particular, it does not depend on the hidden state hvtsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑡h_{v}^{t}. In theory, a network may be able to use the message channel more efficiently if the node messages are allowed to depend on both the source and destination node. Thus we also tried using a variant on the message function as described in (Battaglia et al., 2016). Here the message from w𝑤w to v𝑣v along edge e𝑒e is mw​v=f​(hwt,hvt,ev​w)subscript𝑚𝑤𝑣𝑓superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑤𝑡superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑡subscript𝑒𝑣𝑤m_{wv}=f\left(h_{w}^{t},h_{v}^{t},e_{vw}\right) where f𝑓f is a neural network.
items.zh: 成对消息：矩阵乘法规则的一个特性是，从节点 w 到节点 v 的消息仅取决于隐藏状态 h_w 和边 e_vw。特别地，它不依赖于隐藏状态 h_v^t。理论上，如果允许节点消息依赖于源节点和目标节点，网络可能能够更有效地使用消息通道。因此，我们还尝试了如 Battaglia 等人（2016）所述的消息函数变体。这里，从 w 到 v 沿边 e 的消息是 m_wv = f(h_w^t, h_v^t, e_vw)，其中 f 是一个神经网络。

items.en: When we apply the above message functions to directed graphs, there are two separate functions used, Minsuperscript𝑀inM^{\textrm{in}} and an Moutsuperscript𝑀outM^{\textrm{out}}. Which function is applied to a particular edge ev​wsubscript𝑒𝑣𝑤e_{vw} depends on the direction of that edge.
items.zh: 当我们将上述消息函数应用于有向图时，会使用两个独立的函数：M^in 和 M^out。哪个函数应用于特定的边 e_vw 取决于该边的方向。

items.en: We explored two different ways to change how the messages are passed throughout the model. The simplest modification involves adding a separate “virtual” edge type for pairs of nodes that are not connected. This can be implemented as a data preprocessing step and allows information to travel long distances during the propagation phase.
items.zh: 我们探索了两种不同的方式来改变消息在整个模型中的传递方式。最简单的修改涉及为未连接的节点对添加一个单独的“虚拟”边类型。这可以作为数据预处理步骤实现，并允许信息在传播阶段进行长距离传输。

items.en: We also experimented with using a latent “master” node, which is connected to every input node in the graph with a special edge type. The master node serves as a global scratch space that each node both reads from and writes to in every step of message passing. We allow the master node to have a separate node dimension dm​a​s​t​e​rsubscript𝑑𝑚𝑎𝑠𝑡𝑒𝑟d_{master}, as well as separate weights for the internal update function (in our case a GRU). This allows information to travel long distances during the propagation phase. It also, in theory, allows additional model capacity (e.g. large values of dm​a​s​t​e​rsubscript𝑑𝑚𝑎𝑠𝑡𝑒𝑟d_{master}) without a substantial hit in performance, as the complexity of the master node model is O​(|E|​d2+n​dm​a​s​t​e​r2)𝑂𝐸superscript𝑑2𝑛subscriptsuperscript𝑑2𝑚𝑎𝑠𝑡𝑒𝑟O(|E|d^{2}+nd^{2}_{master}).
items.zh: 我们还尝试使用一个潜在的“主”节点，该节点通过一种特殊的边类型连接到图中的每个输入节点。主节点作为一个全局暂存空间，每个节点在消息传递的每一步都从中读取和写入。我们允许主节点有一个单独的节点维度 d_master，以及用于内部更新函数（在我们的例子中是 GRU）的单独权重。这允许信息在传播阶段进行长距离传输。理论上，它还允许在不显著影响性能的情况下增加模型容量（例如，较大的 d_master 值），因为主节点模型的复杂度为 O(|E|d² + n d_master²)。

items.en: We experimented with two readout functions. First is the readout function used in GG-NN, which is defined by equation 4. Second is a set2set model from Vinyals et al. (2015). The set2set model is specifically designed to operate on sets and should have more expressive power than simply summing the final node states. This model first applies a linear projection to each tuple (hvT,xvsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑇subscript𝑥𝑣h_{v}^{T},x_{v}) and then takes as input the set of projected tuples T={(hvT,xv)}𝑇superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑇subscript𝑥𝑣T=\{(h_{v}^{T},x_{v})\}. Then, after M𝑀M steps of computation, the set2set model produces a graph level embedding qt∗superscriptsubscript𝑞𝑡q_{t}^{*} which is invariant to the order of the of the tuples T𝑇T. We feed this embedding qt∗superscriptsubscript𝑞𝑡q_{t}^{*} through a neural network to produce the output.
items.zh: 我们尝试了两种读出函数。第一种是 GG-NN 中使用的读出函数，由方程 4 定义。第二种是来自 Vinyals 等人（2015）的 set2set 模型。set2set 模型专门设计用于操作集合，并且应该比简单地对最终节点状态求和具有更强的表达能力。该模型首先对每个元组 (h_v^T, x_v) 应用线性投影，然后将投影后的元组集合 T = {(h_v^T, x_v)} 作为输入。然后，经过 M 步计算后，set2set 模型产生一个图级别的嵌入 q_t^*，该嵌入对元组 T 的顺序不变。我们将这个嵌入 q_t^* 通过一个神经网络以产生输出。

items.en: One issue with MPNN’s is scalability. In particular, a single step of the message passing phase for a dense graph requires O​(n2​d2)𝑂superscript𝑛2superscript𝑑2O(n^{2}d^{2}) floating point multiplications. As n𝑛n or d𝑑d get large this can be computationally expensive. To address this issue we break the d𝑑d dimensional node embeddings hvtsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑡h_{v}^{t} into k𝑘k different d/k𝑑𝑘d/k dimensional embeddings hvt,ksuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑣𝑡𝑘h_{v}^{t,k} and run a propagation step on each of the k𝑘k copies separately to get temporary embeddings {h~vt+1,k,v∈G}superscriptsubscript~ℎ𝑣𝑡1𝑘𝑣𝐺\{\tilde{h}_{v}^{t+1,k},v\in G\}, using separate message and update functions for each copy. The k𝑘k temporary embeddings of each node are then mixed together according to the equation
items.zh: MPNN 的一个问题是可扩展性。特别是，对于稠密图，消息传递阶段的一步需要 O(n² d²) 次浮点乘法。随着 n 或 d 变大，这可能会在计算上非常昂贵。为了解决这个问题，我们将 d 维节点嵌入 h_v^t 分解为 k 个不同的 d/k 维嵌入 h_v^{t,k}，并在每个 k 副本上分别运行传播步骤，以得到临时嵌入 {h̃_v^{t+1,k}, v ∈ G}，每个副本使用单独的消息和更新函数。然后，每个节点的 k 个临时嵌入根据以下方程混合：

items.en: where g𝑔g denotes a neural network and (x,y,…)𝑥𝑦…(x,y,\ldots) denotes concatenation, with g𝑔g shared across all nodes in the graph. This mixing preserves the invariance to permutations of the nodes, while allowing the different copies of the graph to communicate with each other during the propagation phase. This can be advantageous in that it allows larger hidden states for the same number of parameters, which yields a computational speedup in practice. For example, when the message function is matrix multiplication (as in GG-NN) a propagation step of a single copy takes O​(n2​(d/k)2)𝑂superscript𝑛2superscript𝑑𝑘2O\left(n^{2}(d/k)^{2}\right) time, and there are k𝑘k copies, therefore the overall time complexity is O​(n2​d2/k)𝑂superscript𝑛2superscript𝑑2𝑘O\left(n^{2}d^{2}/k\right), with some additional overhead due to the mixing network. For k=8𝑘8k=8, n=9𝑛9n=9 and d=200𝑑200d=200 we see a factor of 2 speedup in inference time over a k=1𝑘1k=1, n=9𝑛9n=9, and d=200𝑑200d=200 architecture. This variation would be most useful for larger molecules, for instance molecules from GDB-17 (Ruddigkeit et al., 2012).
items.zh: 其中 g 表示一个神经网络，(x, y, ...) 表示拼接，g 在图中的所有节点之间共享。这种混合保持了节点排列的不变性，同时允许图的不同副本在传播阶段相互通信。这可能是有利的，因为它允许在相同参数数量下使用更大的隐藏状态，从而在实践中实现计算加速。例如，当消息函数是矩阵乘法（如 GG-NN）时，单个副本的传播步骤需要 O(n² (d/k)²) 时间，并且有 k 个副本，因此总体时间复杂度为 O(n² d² / k)，加上混合网络的一些额外开销。对于 k=8、n=9 和 d=200，我们观察到推理时间比 k=1、n=9 和 d=200 的架构加速了 2 倍。这种变体对于较大的分子最有用，例如来自 GDB-17（Ruddigkeit 等人，2012）的分子。

items.en: There are a number of features available for each atom in a molecule which capture both properties of the electrons in the atom as well as the bonds that the atom participates in. For a list of all of the features see table 1. We experimented with making the hydrogen atoms explicit nodes in the graph (as opposed to simply including the count as a node feature), in which case graphs have up to 29 nodes. Note that having larger graphs significantly slows training time, in this case by a factor of roughly 10. For the adjacency matrix there are three edge representations used depending on the model.
items.zh: 分子中的每个原子都有许多可用的特征，这些特征捕获了原子中电子的性质以及原子参与的键的性质。所有特征的列表见表 1。我们尝试将氢原子作为图中的显式节点（而不是简单地将计数作为节点特征），在这种情况下，图最多有 29 个节点。注意，更大的图会显著减慢训练时间，在这种情况下大约慢 10 倍。对于邻接矩阵，根据模型使用三种边表示。

items.en: Chemical Graph: In the abscence of distance information, adjacency matrix entries are discrete bond types: single, double, triple, or aromatic.
items.zh: 化学图：在没有距离信息的情况下，邻接矩阵条目是离散的键类型：单键、双键、三键或芳香键。

items.en: Distance bins: The matrix multiply message function assumes discrete edge types, so to include distance information we bin bond distances into 10 bins, the bins are obtained by uniformly partitioning the interval [2,6]26[2,6] into 8 bins, followed by adding a bin [0,2]02[0,2] and [6,∞]6[6,\infty]. These bins were hand chosen by looking at a histogram of all distances. The adjacency matrix then has entries in an alphabet of size 14, indicating bond type for bonded atoms and distance bin for atoms that are not bonded. We found the distance for bonded atoms to be almost completely determined by bond type.
items.zh: 距离箱：矩阵乘法消息函数假设离散的边类型，因此为了包含距离信息，我们将键距离分箱为 10 个箱，这些箱通过将区间 [2,6] 均匀划分为 8 个箱，然后添加一个箱 [0,2] 和 [6,∞] 得到。这些箱是通过查看所有距离的直方图手动选择的。然后邻接矩阵的条目属于大小为 14 的字母表，对于成键原子指示键类型，对于未成键原子指示距离箱。我们发现成键原子的距离几乎完全由键类型决定。

items.en: Raw distance feature: When using a message function which operates on vector valued edges, the entries of the adjacency matrix are then 5 dimensional, where the first dimension indicates the euclidean distance between the pair of atoms, and the remaining four are a one-hot encoding of the bond type.
items.zh: 原始距离特征：当使用操作于向量值边的消息函数时，邻接矩阵的条目是 5 维的，其中第一维表示原子对之间的欧几里得距离，其余四维是键类型的独热编码。

items.en: Each model and target combination was trained using a uniform random hyper parameter search with 50 trials. T𝑇T was constrained to be in the range 3≤T≤83𝑇83\leq T\leq 8 (in practice, any T≥3𝑇3T\geq 3 works). The number of set2set computations M𝑀M was chosen from the range 1≤M≤121𝑀121\leq M\leq 12. All models were trained using SGD with the ADAM optimizer (Kingma & Ba (2014)), with batch size 20 for 3 million steps ( 540 epochs). The initial learning rate was chosen uniformly between 1​e−51superscript𝑒51e^{-5} and 5​e−45superscript𝑒45e^{-4}. We used a linear learning rate decay that began between 10% and 90% of the way through training and the initial learning rate l𝑙l decayed to a final learning rate l∗F𝑙𝐹l*F, using a decay factor F𝐹F in the range [.01,1].011[.01,1].
items.zh: 每个模型和目标组合都使用 50 次试验的均匀随机超参数搜索进行训练。T 被限制在 3 ≤ T ≤ 8 范围内（实际上，任何 T ≥ 3 都有效）。set2set 计算次数 M 从 1 ≤ M ≤ 12 范围内选择。所有模型都使用 SGD 和 ADAM 优化器（Kingma & Ba, 2014）进行训练，批量大小为 20，训练 300 万步（约 540 个 epoch）。初始学习率在 1e-5 和 5e-4 之间均匀选择。我们使用线性学习率衰减，从训练进度的 10% 到 90% 之间开始，初始学习率 l 衰减到最终学习率 l * F，衰减因子 F 在 [0.01, 1] 范围内。

items.en: The QM-9 dataset has 130462 molecules in it. We randomly chose 10000 samples for validation, 10000 samples for testing, and used the rest for training. We use the validation set to do early stopping and model selection and we report scores on the test set. All targets were normalized to have mean 0 and variance 1. We minimize the mean squared error between the model output and the target, although we evaluate mean absolute error.
items.zh: QM-9 数据集中有 130462 个分子。我们随机选择 10000 个样本用于验证，10000 个样本用于测试，其余用于训练。我们使用验证集进行早停和模型选择，并报告测试集上的分数。所有目标都被归一化为均值 0 和方差 1。我们最小化模型输出与目标之间的均方误差，尽管我们评估的是平均绝对误差。

items.en: In all of our tables we report the ratio of the mean absolute error (MAE) of our models with the provided estimate of chemical accuracy for that target. Thus any model with error ratio less than 1 has achieved chemical accuracy for that target. In the supplementary material we list the chemical accuracy estimates for each target, these are the same estimates that were given in Faber et al. (2017). In this way, the MAE of our models can be calculated as (Error Ratio)×(Chemical Accuracy)Error RatioChemical Accuracy(\textrm{Error Ratio})\times(\textrm{Chemical Accuracy}). Note, unless otherwise indicated, all tables display result of models trained individually on each target (as opposed to training one model to predict all 13).
items.zh: 在所有表格中，我们报告了模型平均绝对误差（MAE）与目标化学精度估计值的比率。因此，任何误差比小于1的模型都已达到该目标的化学精度。在补充材料中，我们列出了每个目标的化学精度估计值，这些估计值与Faber等人（2017）给出的相同。通过这种方式，我们模型的MAE可以计算为（误差比）×（化学精度）。注意，除非另有说明，所有表格显示的是针对每个目标单独训练的模型的结果（而非训练一个模型预测所有13个目标）。

items.en: We performed numerous experiments in order to find the best possible MPNN on this dataset as well as the proper input representation. In our experiments, we found that including the complete edge feature vector (bond type, spatial distance) and treating hydrogen atoms as explicit nodes in the graph to be very important for a number of targets. We also found that training one model per target consistently outperformed jointly training on all 13 targets. In some cases the improvement was up to 40%. Our best MPNN variant used the edge network message function, set2set output, and operated on graphs with explicit hydrogens. We were able to further improve performance on the test set by ensembling the predictions of the five models with lowest validation error.
items.zh: 我们进行了大量实验，以找到在此数据集上最佳的消息传递神经网络（MPNN）以及合适的输入表示。在实验中，我们发现包含完整的边特征向量（键类型、空间距离）并将氢原子视为图中的显式节点对许多目标非常重要。我们还发现，每个目标单独训练一个模型始终优于在所有13个目标上联合训练。在某些情况下，改进幅度高达40%。我们最佳的MPNN变体使用了边网络消息函数、set2set输出，并在具有显式氢原子的图上运行。通过集成验证误差最低的五个模型的预测，我们进一步提高了测试集上的性能。

items.en: In table 2 we compare the performance of our best MPNN variant (denoted with enn-s2s) and the corresponding ensemble (denoted with enn-s2s-ens5) with the previous state of the art on this dataset as reported in Faber et al. (2017). For clarity the error ratios of the best non-ensemble models are shown in bold. This previous work performed a comparison study of several existing ML models for QM9 and we have taken care to use the same train, validation, and test split. These baselines include 5 different hand engineered molecular representations, which then get fed through a standard, off-the-shelf classifier. These input representations include the Coulomb Matrix (CM, Rupp et al. (2012)), Bag of Bonds (BoB, Hansen et al. (2015)), Bonds Angles, Machine Learning (BAML, Huang & von Lilienfeld (2016)), Extended Connectivity Fingerprints (ECPF4, Rogers & Hahn (2010)), and “Projected Histograms” (HDAD, Faber et al. (2017)) representations. In addition to these hand engineered features we include two existing baseline MPNNs, the Molecular Graph Convolutions model (GC) from Kearnes et al. (2016), and the original GG-NN model Li et al. (2016) trained with distance bins. Overall, our new MPNN achieves chemical accuracy on 11 out of 13 targets and state of the art on all 13 targets.
items.zh: 在表2中，我们将最佳MPNN变体（记为enn-s2s）及其集成（记为enn-s2s-ens5）的性能与Faber等人（2017）报告的最新结果进行了比较。为清晰起见，最佳非集成模型的误差比以粗体显示。该先前工作对QM9的几种现有机器学习模型进行了比较研究，我们注意使用了相同的训练集、验证集和测试集划分。这些基线包括5种不同的手工工程分子表示，然后通过标准的现成分类器。这些输入表示包括库仑矩阵（CM, Rupp等人, 2012）、键袋（BoB, Hansen等人, 2015）、键角机器学习（BAML, Huang & von Lilienfeld, 2016）、扩展连接性指纹（ECPF4, Rogers & Hahn, 2010）和“投影直方图”（HDAD, Faber等人, 2017）表示。除了这些手工工程特征，我们还包含了两个现有的基线MPNN：来自Kearnes等人（2016）的分子图卷积模型（GC）和Li等人（2016）的原始GG-NN模型（使用距离箱训练）。总体而言，我们的新MPNN在13个目标中的11个上达到了化学精度，并在所有13个目标上达到了最先进水平。

items.en: Training Without Spatial Information: We also experimented in the setting where spatial information is not included in the input. In general, we find that augmenting the MPNN with some means of capturing long range interactions between nodes in the graph greatly improves performance in this setting. To demonstrate this we performed 4 experiments, one where we train the GG-NN model on the sparse graph, one where we add virtual edges, one where we add a master node, and one where we change the graph level output to a set2set output. The error ratios averaged across the 13 targets are shown in table 3. Overall, these three modifications help on all 13 targets, and the Set2Set output achieves chemical accuracy on 5 out of 13 targets. For more details, consult the supplementary material. The experiments shown tables 3 and 4 were run with a partial charge feature as a node input. This feature is an output of the DFT calculation and thus could not be used in an applied setting. The state of art numbers we report in table 2 do not use this feature.
items.zh: 无空间信息的训练：我们还实验了输入中不包含空间信息的情况。总的来说，我们发现通过某种方式增强MPNN以捕获图中节点之间的长程相互作用，在此设置下能大幅提高性能。为了证明这一点，我们进行了4个实验：一个是在稀疏图上训练GG-NN模型，一个是添加虚拟边，一个是添加主节点，另一个是将图级输出改为set2set输出。表3显示了13个目标上的平均误差比。总体而言，这三种修改对所有13个目标都有帮助，其中Set2Set输出在13个目标中的5个上达到了化学精度。更多细节请参阅补充材料。表3和表4所示的实验使用了部分电荷特征作为节点输入。该特征是DFT计算的输出，因此不能在实际应用中使用。我们在表2中报告的最先进数字未使用此特征。

items.en: Towers: Our original intent in developing the towers variant was to improve training time, as well as to allow the model to be trained on larger graphs. However, we also found some evidence that the multi-tower structure improves generalization performance. In table 4 we compare GG-NN + towers + set2set output vs a baseline GG-NN + set2set output when distance bins are used. We do this comparison in both the joint training regime and when training one model per target. The towers model outperforms the baseline model on 12 out of 13 targets in both individual and joint target training. We believe the benefit of towers is that it resembles training an ensemble of models. Unfortunately, our attempts so far at combining the towers and edge network message function have failed to further improve performance, possibly because the combination makes training more difficult. Further training details, and error ratios on all targets can be found in the supplementary material.
items.zh: Towers：我们开发towers变体的初衷是改善训练时间，并允许模型在更大的图上训练。然而，我们也发现一些证据表明多塔结构提高了泛化性能。在表4中，我们比较了使用距离箱时GG-NN + towers + set2set输出与基线GG-NN + set2set输出。我们在联合训练和每个目标单独训练两种情况下进行了比较。在单独和联合目标训练中，towers模型在13个目标中的12个上优于基线模型。我们认为towers的好处在于它类似于训练一个模型集成。不幸的是，我们迄今为止尝试将towers与边网络消息函数结合未能进一步提高性能，可能是因为这种组合使训练更加困难。进一步的训练细节和所有目标的误差比可在补充材料中找到。

items.en: Additional Experiments: In preliminary experiments, we tried disabling weight tying across different time steps. However, we found that the most effective way to increase performance was to tie the weights and use a larger hidden dimension d𝑑d. We also early on found the pair message function to perform worse than the edge network function. This included a toy pathfinding problem which was originally designed to benefit from using pair messages. Also, when trained jointly on the 13 targets the edge network function outperforms pair message on 11 out of 13 targets, and has an average error ratio of 1.53 compared to 3.98 for pair message. Given the difficulties with training this function we did not pursue it further. For performance on smaller sized training sets, consult the supplementary material.
items.zh: 额外实验：在初步实验中，我们尝试了在不同时间步禁用权重共享。然而，我们发现提高性能最有效的方法是共享权重并使用更大的隐藏维度d。我们还早期发现对消息函数的表现不如边网络函数。这包括一个最初设计用于从对消息中受益的玩具寻路问题。此外，当在13个目标上联合训练时，边网络函数在13个目标中的11个上优于对消息，平均误差比为1.53，而对消息为3.98。鉴于训练该函数的困难，我们没有进一步研究。关于较小训练集上的性能，请参阅补充材料。

items.en: Our results show that MPNN’s with the appropriate message, update, and output functions have a useful inductive bias for predicting molecular properties, outperforming several strong baselines and eliminating the need for complicated feature engineering. Moreover, our results also reveal the importance of allowing long range interactions between nodes in the graph with either the master node or the set2set output. The towers variation makes these models more scalable, but additional improvements will be needed to scale to much larger graphs.
items.zh: 我们的结果表明，具有适当消息、更新和输出函数的MPNN在预测分子性质方面具有有用的归纳偏置，优于几个强基线，并消除了复杂特征工程的需要。此外，我们的结果还揭示了允许图中节点之间长程相互作用（通过主节点或set2set输出）的重要性。towers变体使这些模型更具可扩展性，但需要进一步改进才能扩展到更大的图。

items.en: An important future direction is to design MPNNs that can generalize effectively to larger graphs than those appearing in the training set or at least work with benchmarks designed to expose issues with generalization across graph sizes. Generalizing to larger molecule sizes seems particularly challenging when using spatial information. First of all, the pairwise distance distribution depends heavily on the number of atoms. Second, our most successful ways of using spatial information create a fully connected graph where the number of incoming messages also depends on the number of nodes. To address the second issue, we believe that adding an attention mechanism over the incoming message vectors could be an interesting direction to explore.
items.zh: 一个重要的未来方向是设计能够有效泛化到比训练集中更大图的MPNN，或者至少使用旨在暴露跨图大小泛化问题的基准。在使用空间信息时，泛化到更大的分子大小似乎特别具有挑战性。首先，成对距离分布严重依赖于原子数量。其次，我们最成功的空间信息使用方式创建了一个全连接图，其中传入消息的数量也依赖于节点数量。为了解决第二个问题，我们认为在传入消息向量上添加注意力机制是一个值得探索的有趣方向。

items.en: We would like to thank Lukasz Kaiser, Geoffrey Irving, Alex Graves, and Yujia Li for helpful discussions. Thank you to Adrian Roitberg for pointing out an issue with the use of partial charges in an earlier version of this paper.
items.zh: 我们要感谢Lukasz Kaiser、Geoffrey Irving、Alex Graves和Yujia Li的有益讨论。感谢Adrian Roitberg指出本文早期版本中使用部分电荷的问题。
